name: Journey to Earth
short_description: You are an experienced astronaut, stranded in space. Will you reach Earth, or will you get lost in space and die?
detailed_description:
You are an experienced astronaut in a powerful space program. However, due to an unexpected malfunction, you find yourself stranded in the middle of Pluto in space. Your only mission now is to return to Earth safely. But you run the risk of getting lost and dying in space. To survive, you must overcome challenges, manage limited resources, utilize your tools, and use your intelligence to find your way. Every choice you make will affect your chance of survival. You will encounter different adventures and creatures on each planet. Fight for survival in the depths of space without losing hope of returning to Earth

  • Single Player

  • Role Play game

  • Captivating story

  • Third Person

  • Realistic Graphic

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
